summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ATC Master Platform iteration 6 - New public landing page with Google Maps integration. All features working correctly. Landing page displays at root URL `/` without authentication. Login flow redirects to `/dashboard` successfully.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 tested new public landing page with Google Maps. All features verified: Hero section with 'More Than Just Care' headline, navigation bar with Services/How It Works/Testimonials/Contact links, Owner Login button navigates to /login, 4 service cards, 3 testimonial cards, contact form with Google Maps embed (Sydney location with dark theme), smooth scroll navigation, mobile responsive menu. Login with admin credentials redirects to /dashboard showing Owner Portal.
